reference: Dear Sir, my sperm count is thirty%, total motility is fifty%. Sperm motility is as follows: Grade I - thirty%, Grade II - thirty%, Grade III - twenty%, Grade IV - twenty%. Sperm morphology shows normal percentage, abnormal ten%, and dead sixty%. Pus cells are between eight to ten. Can you please tell me if my report is normal or not? If it is not normal, could you suggest which treatment I should pursue?
text: Dear sir, my sperm count is 30%, total motility is 50%, sperm motility is as follows, grade I 30%, grade 2 30%, grade 3 20%, grade 4 20%, sperm morphology shows normal percentage, abnormal 10% and dead 60%, puss cells are between 8 to 10. Can you please tell me if my report is normal or not? If it is not normal, could you suggest which treatment I should pursue?
